price: 106. When their brother Nûh (Noah) said to them: "Will you not fear Allâh and obey Him?
arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

version.title: English Translation - Hilali and Khan
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into English by Taqi-ud-Din Al-Hilali and Muhsen Khan

meta.transliteration: idh qāla lahum akhūhum nūḥun alā tattaqūna
